Our Story

Who We Are

Test Realty is a Dubai-based real estate company built to connect visionary investors with exceptional opportunities in one of the world's most dynamic property markets.

With deep developer relationships and a curated approach, Test Realty delivers exclusive access to premium off-plan opportunities before they reach the open market.

Vision

To become a globally trusted real estate brand connecting international investors to Dubai's most strategic and high-end property opportunities.

Mission

To help investors build, grow, and manage high-performing real estate portfolios in Dubai through expert guidance, strategic opportunities, and long-term partnership.

Meet Our Founder
Test Client
Founder & Managing Director
Arabic · English · Korean
My approach is simple and disciplined: find asymmetric value and structure clear terms. The outcome is not a sale, it’s a strategic asset that advances my client’s financial goals.
, Test Client
Founder & Vision

Test Client

Emirati real estate advisor with experience working alongside leading developers and international investors in Dubai's property market.

With a global network and multilingual communication in Arabic, English and Korean, Test Client specializes in connecting international investors and end-users with strategic opportunities in Dubai.

Her vision behind Test Realty is to build a trusted real estate brand that helps clients build and grow high-performing property portfolios.

Our Approach
Test Client + Empire , the vision of building lasting real estate empires through leadership and strategic investment.

Why Choose Us

The Test Realty Difference

01
Emirati Leadership & Local Authority

Founded in the UAE, bringing authentic local insight into Dubai's evolving real estate market. Our leadership understands the culture, regulations, and long-term vision of the city.

02
Long-Term Partnership

We believe real estate success is built through long-term relationships, not one-time transactions. Test Realty is committed to being a long-term partner as clients build and expand their Dubai property portfolios.

03
Strong Global Investor Network

Test Realty works with a curated network of top-tier developers, ensuring clients gain priority access to the most sought-after off-plan projects in Dubai.

What We Offer

Our Core Services

Real Estate Investment Strategy

We guide investors in identifying high-potential opportunities across Dubai's property market. Off-plan project analysis, rental yield projections, and market entry guidance for overseas buyers.

Buying, Selling & Leasing

From sourcing the right property to negotiating and closing, we support clients through every step. End-to-end transaction support, contract review, and remote purchasing assistance.

Portfolio & Asset Management

Managing and optimizing real estate portfolios, ensuring your properties generate sustainable returns. Tenant sourcing, rental pricing strategy, and short-term rental management services.

Mortgage & Financing Guidance

Through trusted banking partnerships, we support clients in securing competitive financing solutions. Golden Visa assistance and multilingual support in Arabic, English, and Korean.

The Dubai Advantage

Why Invest in Dubai?

6–10%
Rental Yields

Dubai offers some of the most competitive rental yields globally, making it an appealing market for investors seeking both income and capital appreciation.

0%
Income & Capital Gains Tax

No personal income tax and no capital gains tax on property, making Dubai one of the most investor-friendly destinations in the world.

10yr
Golden Visa

Government initiatives such as long-term residency and the Golden Visa have transformed Dubai into a destination for investment and permanent living.
